$schema_note: Podcast Production Engine (Skill 58) consolidated FURNACE and cost-guardrail config (furnace-design Section 8). SINGLE SOURCE, per-client overridable: a client override merges over these defaults and is recorded on the process certificate. This file owns the operational guardrail knobs (limits, polling, smoke_test, alerts). Runtime model routing lives in models.json; unit prices in cost-model.json; smoke balance endpoints in smoke-endpoints.json; deterministic QC prover bands in bands.json. Every recurring process in this skill is treated as a furnace until proven bounded: worst-case daily spend per client with all guardrails active is 15.01 dollars, and an idle client costs 1 cent. Zero em dashes; no triple-backtick fences in any produced output.

limits_meaning.per_episode_cost_usd_soft: Warn: log plus one deduped operator notice; the run continues.
limits_meaning.per_episode_cost_usd_hard: HALT: episode moves to cost_hold with state preserved; founder alerted once via dedup.
limits_meaning.per_client_daily_cost_usd_hard: New billable calls for this client refuse until the next local day; the in-flight episode finishes its current stage then holds.
limits_meaning.per_client_daily_episode_cap: Episode 4 and beyond of the day is QUEUED to the next day (never dropped), one digest notice.
limits_meaning.llm_tokens_per_episode_hard: Total content-model tokens across ALL passes and ALL QC attempts combined.
limits_meaning.llm_max_output_tokens_per_call: Per-call output cap passed to the provider on every content call.
limits_meaning.web_research_calls_per_episode: Research-tool wrapper refuses call 13; the writer proceeds with what it has.
limits_meaning.web_research_bonus_on_fabrication_fail: One supplemental research pass of at most this many calls, unlocked only by a Tier 1 check 12 fabrication failure, once per episode.
limits_meaning.qc_max_attempts: Three-strike cap: hard stop at 3 failed attempts; founder notified with failing checks and best draft; standards never relaxed.
limits_meaning.image_gen_attempts_max: Kie.ai cover attempts before the episode holds and alerts (deduped).
limits_meaning.tts_synth_attempts_max: Fish Audio synthesis attempts per segment.
limits_meaning.queue_max_hold_days: Credit-out queue maximum hold; auto age-out at this age with a founder notice through dedup.

polling_meaning.kie_backoff_schedule: Kie.ai async image poll backoff in seconds, then stay at 60. Never poll faster than 5 seconds.
polling_meaning.kie_poll_timeout_seconds: Total image poll timeout; on timeout counts as one failed image attempt.
polling_meaning.dashboard_min_refresh_seconds: Client browser auto-refresh floor; the read-only endpoint sets Cache-Control max-age 30; no websockets, no server push, no background workers.

smoke_test_meaning.cron_local_time: One daily smoke-test cron per client at 06:00 client timezone.
smoke_test_meaning.jitter_minutes: Per-client random jitter up to this many minutes to stop a fleet-wide provider stampede.
smoke_test_meaning.max_cost_usd: The entire daily smoke-test run must cost at most this; balance endpoints only, never a model turn, never an image, never a synthesis, never the pipeline.
smoke_test_meaning.overspend_alert_reason: If a run exceeds max_cost_usd, alert the OPERATOR (not the client) with this reason; that is the canary that someone wired a render into the health check.
smoke_test_meaning.recurring_jobs_per_client: Exactly ONE recurring job per client. No heartbeat entry ever, no queue poller, no per-job watchers, no dashboard-driven computation. guard-cron-inventory.py enforces this.
smoke_test_meaning.stale_job_alert_hours: (E8) Default age threshold, in hours, past which a job sitting in a non-terminal, non-held podcast_jobs.status (received/researching/writing/in_qc/generating_art/producing_audio/publishing/enrolling; never queued_credit_out or a TERMINAL_STATES row, those already have their own age/hold handling) fires ONE deduped operator alert via the SAME daily smoke-test cron. Read-only SELECT; never auto-fails or auto-resumes the job.
smoke_test_meaning.stale_job_alert_hours_by_status: Optional per-status override map, e.g. {"in_qc": 12}; a status absent from this map uses stale_job_alert_hours.

alerts_meaning.dedup_window_hours: Repeat alerts with the same client plus service plus failure_class key inside this window are suppressed; the counter and affected-episode list update in place.
alerts_meaning.max_founder_alerts_per_client_per_day: Beyond this, everything collapses into a single end-of-day digest per client. QC three-strike and cost_hold notices always send (decision requests) but still dedup one message per episode per event.
alerts_meaning.gateway_only: Pipeline code never sends Telegram directly; every founder alert routes through alert-dedup.py and always through the OpenClaw gateway, never around it. Zero client-facing messages anywhere in the engine (MOVE IN SILENCE).

$config_set.note: Sibling files of this config-set, all under 58-podcast-production-engine/config/. Each has its own single-source-of-truth scope.
$config_set.furnace.json: This file: operational guardrail knobs (limits, polling, smoke_test, alerts).
$config_set.cost-model.json: Static unit price table; the cost ledger converts metered units to dollars.
$config_set.smoke-endpoints.json: Pinned balance endpoints for the daily smoke test.
$config_set.bands.json: Deterministic QC prover bands and Tier 1 mechanical-check parameters.
